_doc: icecast_parse.json — controls how metadata is embedded into AAC/MP3 Icecast streams.
Set 'template' to a string containing {placeholder} tokens.
Any XML field name can be used as a placeholder, e.g. {artist}, {title},
The station ID (from config.json 'amperwaveStationId') is available as {stationId}.
To omit the station ID entirely, simply leave {stationId} out of the template.
Used when 'template' is absent. Fields are joined with 'separator'.
'includeStationId': true  => station ID is prepended before the first field (default).
'includeStationId': false => station ID is omitted; fields are joined directly.
'fields': ordered list of XML field names to include.
NOTE: The '_doc' key is ignored by the encoder and exists solely for documentation.
